self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Watatsumi Wavewalker (R5): for every point of the party's combined max Energy capacity, Elemental Burst DMG increases by 0.24%, up to a cap of 80%. Modeled at the cap, which a standard 4-person burst-oriented team typically reaches or exceeds (80% / 0.24% = ~333 combined max Energy).
